content:
# 2026-03-30

## Energy
- Slept ~7h, knees stiff

## Done
- Walked 2 miles before church
- Reviewed Hendricks grievance file

## Open
- Call Carla re: bargaining dates

# 2026-03-29

## Energy
- Slept ~6h

## Done
- Sunday service, served communion
- Lunch with Denise

## Open
- Confirm Ruth's PT ride Tuesday

# 2026-03-28

## Energy
- Slept ~7h, decent

## Done
- Sanded the two birdhouses in the shop
- Pulled grievance #JIRA-2287 notes

## Open
- Pick up cedar from the lumber yard

# 2026-03-27

## Energy
- Slept ~7h

## Done
- Steward hours, two intake calls
- Smoked a brisket for Saturday

## Open
- Email Raymond about practice field

# 2026-03-26

## Energy
- Slept ~8h, good

## Done
- Walk with Big D after shift
- Logged cholesterol numbers in app

## Open
- Order new blade for the table saw

# Late-night thoughts — contract fight

Can't sleep. The plant keeps pushing the two-tier wage thing and the floor knows it.

## What's eating at me
- New hires getting squeezed on starting pay
- Mandatory OT every other Saturday

## What to bring to Carla
- Member survey numbers before we sit down
- Hold the line on the cost-of-living language

# Softball lineup ideas

Westside Wolverines — Metro Parks League opener.

## Batting order draft
1. Devon — speed, leadoff
2. T.J. — contact
3. Marcus (if home from school) — power
4. Andre — cleanup
5. Reggie

## Notes
- Talk to Raymond about pitching rotation
- Sit anybody nursing a hamstring

# Devotional notes

## Passage
- James 1:2-4, on perseverance

## Reflection
- Trials as training, not punishment. Reminds me of the floor — you don't quit when it's hard.

## For Sunday's deacon visit
- Share with Brother Hendricks, he's been low

# Ruth's care schedule

Mama — week of the 16th.

## Appointments
- Tue: PT at Meridian Medical, 10am (I drive)
- Thu: Dr. Tate follow-up, 2pm

## Daily
- Denise checks in mornings
- Meds in the blue box, after breakfast

## Open
- Refill the BP prescription

# Coffee and devotional reading

## Notes
- Quiet half hour before the house wakes up.
- Ideas to revisit:
  - Morning devotional out of the Psalms
  - Re-reading parts of King's 'Strength to Love'

# Charleston anniversary ideas

30 years with Denise this fall.

## Ideas
- Carriage tour through the historic district
- Dinner on the waterfront
- Day trip out to a sea-island church

## To do
- Check Amadeus for Charleston flights
- Look at that Airbnb downtown again

# Workshop project list

## On the bench
- Two cedar birdhouses for the Etsy shop
- Repair Ruth's porch railing

## Someday
- Build Denise a potting bench
- Cornhole boards for the church picnic

## Supplies needed
- Cedar planks, wood glue, exterior stain

# Winter reading list

## Going through
- 'The Warmth of Other Suns' — Isabel Wilkerson
- Re-reading 'Strength to Love'

## On deck
- A biography of A. Philip Randolph
- Something on the '37 Flint sit-down strike

# 2025-02-22

## Energy
- Slept ~7h

## Done
- Cleared the driveway, heavy snow
- Read after dinner

## Open
- Call Jasmine back

# 2025-02-25

## Energy
- Slept ~6h

## Done
- Union local meeting, took minutes
- Fixed the kitchen faucet

## Open
- Order parts for the disposal

# 2026-03-13

## Energy
- Slept ~7h

## Done
- Reviewed contract redlines
- Smoker prep for the weekend

## Open
- Get back to Pastor Caldwell on the men's breakfast

# 2026-01-15

## Energy
- Slept ~7h, cold morning

## Done
- Mama's birthday, took her to lunch
- Filed two grievances at the hall

## Open
- Send Marcus the textbook money

# 2026-03-23

## Energy
- Slept ~7h

## Done
- Deacon board meeting after service
- Walked the back nine of the garden plan

## Open
- Price out raised beds

# Open grievance tracker

Local 247 — active cases I'm carrying.

## Step 2
- Hendricks: discipline over attendance points
- Vasquez: missed shift-bid by seniority

## Step 3
- Whitfield: wrongful termination, prepping for arbitration

## Notes
- Watch the 30-day clock on the Vasquez filing

# Spring 2027 roster planning

Westside Wolverines — early notes for next season.

## Returning
- Most of the infield comes back
- Need a catcher, Reggie's knees are done

## Recruiting
- Two kids from the church league looked good
- Run signups through Typeform in February

# Bargaining timeline

Contract expires end of the year — mapping the runway.

## Milestones
- Member survey out by month-end
- Committee prep sessions with Carla, weekly
- First table date targeted for early fall

## Risks
- Plant stalling on info requests
- Need turnout at the ratification vote

# Deacon board notes

Greater Hope Baptist — board meeting.

## Agenda
- Building fund update from the treasurer
- Sign-ups for the relief drive
- 75th anniversary banquet planning

## My action items
- Coordinate visitation rotation with Linda
- Follow up with Pastor Caldwell on the program

# Birdhouse build list

For the Etsy storefront and a couple gifts.

## Builds
- Bluebird box, cedar, x4
- Purple martin condo, ambitious one
- Wren house for Denise's garden

## Notes
- Drill the right entry-hole size per bird
- Leave them unpainted, just seal

# Old Faithful BBQ recipe notes

Keeping the smoker dialed in.

## Brisket
- Salt + pepper bark, 225 low and slow
- Wrap at 165, pull at 203

## Rib rub
- Brown sugar, paprika, a little cayenne

## Reminder
- Cherry wood for ribs, oak for brisket
